summary: Diagnostics Panel, Exportable Trace, and HAR-Style Issue Log
changes: Added #diagPanel fixed-position overlay HTML — rendered in body, hidden by default
Panel contains: subsystem dropdown filter, level filter (All/Warn+Error/Error Only), Export JSON button, Clear button, Close button
Added renderDiagPanel() — reads _diagBuffer, applies filters, renders color-coded rows with timestamp/subsystem/msg/ctx
Added openDiagnosticsPanel() — shows panel, wires filter and button handlers
Added Ctrl+Shift+D keyboard shortcut to toggle the diagnostics panel
Panel auto-scrolls to bottom on render (newest entries visible)
Clear button empties _diagBuffer and removes cp2p_diagnostics from localStorage
